config_or_strategy_flag: Use explicit strategy selection first; do not change SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY semantics directly.
expected_default_impact: Would enable deterministic staged evidence and post-SQL API preservation/skip policy for packaged outputs while preserving validators and final output shape.
minimal_default_change: Change the packaged strategy/default submission strategy from SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY to COMBINED_SAFE_DETERMINISTIC_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE only after explicit user approval.

risk_assessment.api_underuse_risk: low after API preservation guard; dry-runs show API_REQUIRED underuse 0
risk_assessment.runtime_cost_risk: low to favorable; candidate reduces optional API calls in internal benchmarks
risk_assessment.scoring_uncertainty: organizer 35 gain is small; promotion should still be explicit and reversible

rollback_plan: Revert packaged default strategy references to SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY.
